title: Pluma caduci angeli
description: This resource pack changes your swords when renaming to "Pluma caduci angeli" to a fan.
body:
This resource pack changes your swords when renaming to "Pluma caduci angeli" to a fan.
![a fan in the leading hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f85b07ce9a59bb60de343beefade23bffdc06bc5.png)![fan in the left hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef9629d2bd665f0cf630c0105d1bfb0c91eced08.png)
